description: If both peers send RELEASE simultaneously, each MUST accept the crossing RELEASEs and respond with RELEASE_ACK without raising an ERROR
notes: The runner sends RELEASE and immediately expects a RELEASE_ACK. In a true simultaneous-close scenario the implementation will also have sent RELEASE; the runner treats receipt of RELEASE from the implementation as equivalent to RELEASE_ACK for the purposes of this test, since both constitute confirmation of close.

steps.comment: Accept either RELEASE_ACK (0x0E) or a crossing RELEASE (0x0D). Neither is an ERROR (0xFF).
